<!--
Please consider the following criteria when creating an issue:

1. Is this the right plugin to be creating this issue?

    If this is a Lite issue add the "free plugin" label.

    If it is an add-on feature, create the issue there. For example:
    - Views https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-views
    - Surveys (Likert fields, NPS fields, or radio buttons that use buttons) https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-surveys/
    - Dates (inline dates, blackout dates, blocking specific days of the week) https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-dates/
    - Form action automation https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-autoresponder
    - Stripe https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-stripe
    - Forms loaded using an [frm-api] shortcode or /embed/ script tag https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-api
    - User registration https://github.com/Strategy11/formidable-registration/

2. Am I including all of the relevant data I can?

    Make sure that you include all of the following when applicable:
    - Link to HelpScout ticket. Summarize the ticket as not everyone has a HelpScout login.
    - An XML export.
    - A URL to a QA site where the issue is replicated.
    - Replication steps, including the expected result and the actual result.
    - A screen recording. Try to attach it to the issue. Links to Loom often expire.
    - Consider including screenshots for visual issues.
    - For conflicts include the name of the conflicting theme or plugin.
    - PHP or JavaScript error messages. PHP errors can be found in the debug.log file and JavaScript errors can be seen in the console using developer tools.

3. What labels might be a good fit?

    Labeling makes it easier to sort and identify patterns. Examples include:
    - Type. Try to tag it as a bug, enhancement, or conflict. Is this issue a regression from a recent update, or can it be replicated in older versions?
    - Focus. Is this related to accessibility, the form builder, the front end, UI, validation, or responsiveness?
    - Feature. Is this related to conditional logic, repeaters, saving drafts, styling, calculations, akismet, applications, import/export, stats/graphs, form actions, protected files, edit in-place?
    - Field Type. This this related to summary fields, name fields, checkboxes, page breaks, file fields, captchas, or another type of field?
-->
